title: Inference gateway returning 403 to legitimate traffic after edge rule rollout
description: Starting at 03:14 UTC, the inference-gateway service began returning HTTP 403 responses to inference requests originating from EU-West, AP-Southeast, and SA-East regions. The failure correlates with the promotion of edge rule geo-restrict-v42 from dry-run to blocking mode at 03:12 UTC. Affected traffic includes production model inference for GPT-class and embedding endpoints. Customer-reported impact includes failed batch inference jobs and real-time serving degradation across three availability zones.
symptoms: Error rate jumped from 0.04% baseline to 38.7% within 90 seconds
p99 latency spike to 12400ms due to retry storms from client SDKs
Downstream batch pipeline failures in Meridian's training data collection
Customer support ticket volume 14x normal rate
